howItWorks.intro: This salary calculator uses standard formulas to provide accurate results.
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: How is hourly rate converted to annual?
faq.answer: Hourly × hours per week × 52 weeks. A $30/hour rate at 40 hours/week = $62,400 annually.

faq.question: Does this include overtime?
faq.answer: This assumes straight-time hours only. Overtime (1.5x for hours over 40/week) would increase actual earnings.

faq.question: What about paid time off?
faq.answer: This calculation assumes 52 working weeks. If you get 2 weeks PTO, you still earn the same annual amount — just working 50 weeks instead of 52.

faq.question: How do I compare salaries across cities?
faq.answer: Use a cost-of-living calculator to adjust. A $65K salary in Kansas City may provide the same lifestyle as $95K in San Francisco.
